effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of your turn, COST  [retire this unit], and call up to two Plant tokens to (RC). (Plant tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
flavorTextEN: The flash of a graceful blade sprouts life.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Magnolia" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for every two of your grade 2 or greater units. If this unit got [Power]+10000 or greater by this effect, at the end of that battle, COST  [bind this unit], and Counter Charge (1)/Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: A long rest after a day of hard work.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have two or more grade 1 or less back row rear-guards, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Allow me to show you, my unwithering love.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 or less card from among them, call it to (RC), it gets "Boost" until end of turn, and discard the rest.
flavorTextEN: Cheerful sounds with the brilliant parade. Almost like the lands told in fairytales.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Taking prey with enjoyment. That is our unchanging rule.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your other units in the same column as this unit, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Buried in the ground is the past that is yet to be seen... That is the meaning of romance......

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit's attack hits, if you have a [Stand] vanguard with "Flagburg" in its card name, [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: This is his field. Nobody can escape from him.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, if this was the second battle of this turn, and you have a [Stand] vanguard with "Flagburg" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have another grade 2 or greater unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have another grade 2 or greater unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked a grade 2 or greater vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Show me more, that face twisted in anguish!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have five or more units, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Protecting the forest with a strong will, the gentle stone guardians.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, if it is the second battle of this turn, and you have a [Stand] vanguard with "Flagburg" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Following the second strike, is a fierce third strike.

nameEN: Marine General of the Restless Tides, Algos
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with only «Aqua Force» for its clan, look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card with only «Aqua Force» for its clan or a <Tear Dragon> from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this attacks, if it is the fourth battle of this turn or more, and you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Maelstrom" in its card name, until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and "[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, draw a card.".
flavorTextEN: The sound of the roaring sea will be passed down forever. Of the feats of an honorable marine general.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards with "Maelstrom" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle that this unit attacked, and if it is the second battle of that turn, if you have a [Stand] vanguard with "Maelstrom" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: The crashing of high waves becomes the water that calls forth the great storm.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your rear-guard retires by your card effect during your turn, during that turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The season of harvest is right ahead. Eat more and grow big.

nameEN: Marine General of the Whirling Wave, Leftelis
effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other unit [Stand] by your card effect, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Surge of whirling tides―― To follow the just path with a noble blade!

effectEN:
[AUTO](Drop):When your vanguard with "Magnolia" in its card name is placed during your ride phase, if your soul does not have a "Sylvan Horned Beast, Goildoat", COST  [put this card into soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](Back Row RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, if this unit is in the center column, COST  [retire this unit], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: When the king's mighty roar echoes in the valley, through the cliffs he comes.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your other units, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+10000 until end of turn. ("If you persona rode" is active even if persona ride activated outside normal riding)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:

[AUTO](Front row RC):At the beginning of your battle phase, if you have a vanguard named "Granfia" in its card name, you may call one Plant Token to (RC).

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have another grade 2 or greater unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Oh fools who can't see the feint. Here's the real thing. Sink!

flavorTextEN: Allow me to show you, my unwithering love.

flavorTextEN: Buried in the ground is the past that is yet to be seen... That is the meaning of romance......

flavorTextEN: Surge of whirling tides―― To follow the just path with a noble blade!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may call one Plant Token to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker. Search your deck for up to one "Masque of Hydragrum", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: A fallen spawn of the Dragontree. From the watery abyss, foolishness sneers.

effectEN: [AUTO](Drop):When the "Teasing Spiritualist, Zorga Masques" on your (VC) attacks, if you do not have a "Keel Severing" on your (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire a rear-guard], and call this card to a (RC) with a Dragontree marker.
flavorTextEN: A deadly grudge unleashed by naked hostility.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When you play and Alchemagic an order, COST  [discard a card from hand], choose a grade 1 or less card from your drop, and call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put this card on the bottom of deck], and draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and your opponent cannot intercept until end of turn. All of your opponent's front row rear-guards cannot [Stand] during the next stand phase.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have three or more Dragontree markers on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: A wish must be done for the changing world.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, this unit gets "[AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.", and [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, this unit gets "Boost", and can intercept from the back row. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Magnolia" in its card name, and your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put this unit into soul], choose up to one grade 4 unit card with "Magnolia" in its card name from your hand, and ride it as [Stand].
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other unit attacks, if it is the fourth battle of this turn or more, COST  [retire this unit], and the unit that attacked gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):This unit gets [Power]+5000 for each Blue Storm Armada card in your order zone. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](Back Row RC):At the end of the battle your other rear-guard in the same column as this unit attacked, if you have a vanguard with "Maelstrom" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your rear-guards, and swap the position of this unit with that unit.

effectEN:
•Finishing Move Type: Hitting
•Super Finishing Move: Dragon Attack
•Technique: 60

•[Scissors] Finishing Attack Type: Pinching
•Super Finishing Attack ◆ Rolling Clutch Hold
•[Technique] 60

•Finishing Move Type: Throwing
•Super Finishing Move: Sidescrew Throw
•Technique: 60

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 50 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Hitting - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Dragon Attack" - COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. Then, COST  [discard a "Dragon Attack" from hand], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 50 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Pinching - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Rolling Clutch Hold" - COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and perform "Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, that unit cannot [Stand] during the next stand phase, and cannot intercept until end of turn.", COST  [discard a "Rolling Clutch Hold" from hand], and perform it again.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 50 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Throwing - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Sidescrew Throw" - COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's back row rear-guards, and change the unit being attacked to that unit. Then, COST  [discard a "Sidescrew Throw" from hand], and during that battle, that attacking unit battles your opponent's vanguard as well.

•Finishing Move Type: Pinching
•Super Finishing Move: Rolling Clutch Hold
•Technique: 60

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Rorowa" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire two other rear-guards], choose a grade 2 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
[AUTO](Front Row RC):At the beginning of your battle phase, if you have a unit with "Rorowa" in its card name and a unit with "Radylina" in its card name, you may call a Plant token to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your drop has a blitz order, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & bind this unit], search your deck for up to one grade 2 or greater blitz order without [Regalis Piece], reveal it and put it into hand, and shuffle the deck. If your drop has a blitz order, you may search for a normal order instead of a blitz order.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle. If your drop has a blitz order, it gets +25000 instead of +15000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, this unit gets "Boost", and can intercept from the back row. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: One-two! I don't know what's up, but I'm all pumped up!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The thoughts of the sages gathered approvals, on which Stoicheia was built.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (2)]!
Look at four cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and discard the rest. If during Alchemagic, call up to two cards instead of one to (RC), and all of this order's called units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll lend you a hand. Don't worry, no need for thanks.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform all of the effects below according to the number of times you attacked this turn.
•3 or more ‐ Draw a card.
•4 or more ‐ Choose two of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire them.
•5 or more ‐ Until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call three or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
If your vanguard is "Mysterious Rain Spiritualist, Zorga", choose three of your units, and they get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Negative emotions; as they waver, it learns of joy.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your bind zone has an order card, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: By tightening the nozzle, a much higher water pressure is achieved.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 3 unit card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: An undulating bombardment unleashed at supersonic speeds. This will shift the tide of war.

effectEN: [CONT](VC):When you would play a normal order, you can bind a normal order with the same card name from your drop, and Alchemagic. (Combine the costs, and add the effect to the back!)
flavorTextEN: The humiliation from that day, I'll return it with anger to you!

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):When you would play a normal order, you can bind a normal order with a different card name from your drop, and Alchemagic. (Combine the costs, and add the effect to the back!)
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop zone, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Yes, show it to me. That which you call your way of life.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of any player's rear-guards, retire it, choose up to one card with the same grade as that card from your drop, and call it to (RC). If during Alchemagic, you may choose up to two instead of one to call.
flavorTextEN: As the doors to the underworld opened, the reversal of life and death burst forth.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):If you did not call a rear-guard from other than hand this turn, this unit cannot attack.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your rear-guards, and until end of turn, that unit can attack from the back row, and gets [Power]+5000. If you persona rode this turn, choose three rear-guards instead of one.
flavorTextEN: Surpassing admiration. In order to protect the place of importance.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if two or more units are in front of this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and if they are three or more, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
This cost is reduced by Counter Blast (1) for each card in your bind zone. (Reduce the total cost if during Alchemagic)
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (4)]!
Draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), choose a normal order from your drop, and you may play it without paying its cost. (This play counts for the number of plays too)
flavorTextEN: Through the repeated overlaps of countless deaths, it gained the wings necessary to take off from the seas.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):This unit gets [Power]+5000 for each order card in your bind zone. (Active on your opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):If you did not call a rear-guard from other than from the hand this turn, this unit cannot attack.
flavorTextEN: If you wish for more war achievements, you must first understand your power.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if two or more units are in front of this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and if they are three or more, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Let the Screams Dissolve into the Sound of the Rain
effectEN: Your opponent chooses one of their rear-guards, and retires it. You choose up to one card with the same grade as the unit retired by your opponent from your drop, and call it to (RC).

nameEN: Blue Artillery Dragon, Inlet Pulse Dragon

[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a grade 3 or greater vanguard, if it was the first battle of this turn, and your vanguard is "Flagship Dragon, Flagburg Dragon", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of your turn, if the total number of attacks this turn is four or more, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and draw a card.

This cost is reduced by Counter Blast (1) for each card in your bind zone. (Reduce the total cost if you Alchemagic)

Draw two cards.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):This unit gets [Power]+5000 for each order card in your bind zone. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Invaders are not forgiven, you outlaw that has rotted fully.

effectEN:

flavorTextEN: To exact justice. With all the power available.

flavorTextEN: Through the repeated overlaps of countless deaths, it gained the wings necessary to take off from the seas.

[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call up to three Plant Tokens to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)

[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: Oh great trees of nature, grant me power!

nameEN: Wails Melt in the Sound of Rain
effectEN: Your opponent chooses one of their rear-guards, and retires it. You choose up to one card with the same grade as the unit retired by your opponent from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Enjoy the happiness of the change as much as you can.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from drop, choose a blitz order from your drop, and you may put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Providing the worst cooking experience using the best materials.

effectEN: [AUTO](Drop):When your grade 3 or greater vanguard is placed, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Repeated usurpation filled with delusion.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: A tiny bit different from the usual, don't you think?

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):If you did Alchemagic this turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000.

(Combine the costs, and add the effect to the back!)
flavorTextEN: My magic can reveal the secrets of souls... With it, I shall have you unveil them.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Choose a grade 3 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC). If this is part of Alchemagic, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your front row units get [Power]+5000." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Paint over this life while entwined with an unquenchable thirst.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
All of your grade 1 or less rear-guards get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The flower band shall tell you the advent of the seasons.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on a front row (RC) from hand, if your back row has three or more units, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Clap your hand according to the rhythm! This is also music!

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this card with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire a rear-guard] if you have a vanguard with "Rorowa" in its card name!

flavorTextEN: I'll count on you for my six.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name!
Look at seven cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two grade 1 or less unit cards from among them, call them to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: A dream-like, heart-pounding enjoyable time, let us make it together!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name, all of your other rear-guards in the same column as this unit get "Boost".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If your units boosted a total of three or more times this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name, and your units boosted a total of five or more times this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: Resonating roars shall create a new tune.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and call it to (RC) or discard it. If you called a card, until end of turn, that called unit cannot attack, and gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Play the tune of your thoughts, because hearts yearn to resound with each other.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], discard the top three cards of your deck, choose a card from your drop, call it to (RC) if it is a grade 2 or less card, and put it into your hand if it has the same card name as your vanguard.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When your other unit in the same column as this unit attacks, that unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: Until end of turn, when you would move or swap your rear-guard's position during your main phase, you may move them horizontally.
flavorTextEN: Anywhere should have been within reach, yet that one place continues to elude.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of your turn, if your vanguard is a [Glitter], COST  [put this unit into your soul], and call up to two Plant Tokens to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
flavorTextEN: Swing the shining cane around, and that place becomes a garden.
